B.text: It remains confined to a narrow column beneath the nozzle.

parsed.answer_value: It remains confined to a narrow column beneath the nozzle.
parsed.rationale: The visualization shows the exhaust plume starting as a narrow column directly beneath the rocket nozzle, indicating that it remains confined to a narrow column right after ignition.
